categories.name: Economy
categories.description: Earn, gamble, and manage your bits.

commands.name: beg
commands.description: Beg for a few bits. Sometimes you get nothing.

commands.name: blackjack
commands.description: Play blackjack against the dealer.

commands.name: coinflip
commands.description: Bet on a coin flip. Call heads or tails.

commands.name: cooldowns
commands.description: Show all your cooldowns at a glance.

commands.name: crash
commands.description: Watch the multiplier climb and cash out before it crashes.

commands.name: daily
commands.description: Claim your daily bits. Keep a streak for bigger rewards.

commands.name: deposit
commands.description: Move bits from your wallet into your safe vault. Use `all` to deposit everything.

commands.name: dice
commands.description: Roll under your target (2-98). Lower target, higher payout.

commands.name: generator
commands.description: View your passive generator; claim or upgrade it with buttons.

commands.name: hilo
commands.description: Guess higher or lower. Each call climbs the multiplier; cash out before you miss.

commands.name: ladder
commands.description: Climb the ladder for rising multipliers. Cash out before you bust.

commands.name: leaderboard
commands.description: Server-wide rankings. Use the dropdown to switch board.

commands.name: limbo
commands.description: Set a target multiplier. Win if the round reaches it.

commands.name: pay
commands.description: Pay bits from your wallet to another player. Confirms before sending.

commands.name: plinko
commands.description: Drop a ball down the pegs into a multiplier bucket.

commands.name: pray
commands.description: Pray for bits. Sometimes the heavens are generous.

commands.name: profile
commands.description: Your full economy card: balances, wealth rank, streak, generator, cooldowns.

commands.name: roulette
commands.description: Bet on roulette: red, black, a dozen (1/2/3), or a number (0-36).

commands.name: slots
commands.description: Spin the slot machine.

commands.name: steal
commands.description: Attempt to steal bits from someone's wallet. Confirms before the attempt.

commands.name: vault
commands.description: View your vault and upgrade its capacity with a button.

commands.name: wallet
commands.description: Show your bits, or someone else's.

commands.name: withdraw
commands.description: Move bits from your vault back into your wallet. Use `all` to withdraw everything.

commands.name: work
commands.description: Work for some bits.

commands.name: levels
commands.description: Leveling settings for this server.

commands.name: levels channel
commands.description: Where level-ups post: `here`, `dm`, or a channel.

commands.name: levels cooldown
commands.description: Set the gap between XP-earning messages (0-3600s).

commands.name: levels disable
commands.description: Turn leveling off.

commands.name: levels enable
commands.description: Turn leveling on.

commands.name: levels message
commands.description: Set the level-up message. Placeholders: {user} {user.name} {level} {server}.

commands.name: levels multiplier
commands.description: Per-channel XP multipliers.

commands.name: levels multiplier remove
commands.description: Remove a channel's multiplier.

commands.name: levels multiplier set
commands.description: Scale XP in a channel (0-10; 0 disables XP there). Works for text and voice.

commands.name: levels rate
commands.description: Set XP awarded per message (1-1000).

commands.name: levels reset
commands.description: Wipe one member's progress.

commands.name: levels resetall
commands.description: Wipe every member's progress in this server.

commands.name: levels reward
commands.description: Roles granted on reaching a level.

commands.name: levels reward add
commands.description: Grant a role when members reach a level.

commands.name: levels reward remove
commands.description: Remove a level's reward.

commands.name: levels setlevel
commands.description: Force a member's level (0-1000).

commands.name: levels settings
commands.description: Show this server's current leveling configuration.

commands.name: rank
commands.description: Show your level, rank, and progress to the next level.

commands.name: top
commands.description: This server's level leaderboard (levels are per-server).

categories.name: Moderation
categories.description: Keep your server safe and tidy.

commands.name: automod
commands.description: Automatic moderation: filters, escalating strikes, and exemptions.

commands.name: automod allow
commands.description: Domains the link filter always permits.

commands.name: automod allow add
commands.description: Allowlist a domain (e.g. youtube.com).

commands.name: automod allow remove
commands.description: Remove a domain from the allowlist.

commands.name: automod ban
commands.description: Strike count that triggers a ban (0 = off).

commands.name: automod caps
commands.description: Caps filter: % uppercase to trip, and the min message length to check.

commands.name: automod disable
commands.description: Turn automod off.

commands.name: automod dm
commands.description: Toggle DMing a member when automod actions them.

commands.name: automod dryrun
commands.description: Return to dry-run: automod logs violations but takes no action.

commands.name: automod duplicates
commands.description: How many identical messages in a row trip the duplicate filter.

commands.name: automod emoji
commands.description: Max emoji allowed in one message.

commands.name: automod enable
commands.description: Turn automod on (starts in dry-run, where it logs but takes no action).

commands.name: automod everyone
commands.description: Toggle blocking @everyone/@here from members who lack the permission.

commands.name: automod exempt
commands.description: Roles and channels the automod never acts on.

commands.name: automod exempt channel
commands.description: `add` or `remove` an exempt channel.

commands.name: automod exempt role
commands.description: `add` or `remove` an exempt role.

commands.name: automod exemptmods
commands.description: Toggle exempting members with moderator permissions (recommended on).

commands.name: automod filter
commands.description: Toggle a filter: invites, links, spam, mentions, words, caps, emoji.

commands.name: automod kick
commands.description: Strike count that triggers a kick (0 = off).

commands.name: automod live
commands.description: Leave dry-run: automod will start enforcing actions.

commands.name: automod mentions
commands.description: Max user/role mentions allowed in one message.

commands.name: automod spam
commands.description: Flood filter: trip on `count` messages within `interval` seconds.

commands.name: automod status
commands.description: Show this server's automod configuration.

commands.name: automod timeout
commands.description: Set a timeout tier: `,automod timeout 1 2 10m` = at 2 strikes, time out 10m.

commands.name: automod window
commands.description: How long strikes count toward escalation (hours).

commands.name: automod words
commands.description: The banned-word list (matching resists leetspeak and spacing).

commands.name: automod words add
commands.description: Add one or more banned words (comma- or newline-separated).

commands.name: automod words remove
commands.description: Remove a banned word.

commands.name: ban
commands.description: Ban a user by mention or ID (works even if they aren't in the server).

commands.name: cleanup
commands.description: Remove recent bot messages and command invocations.

commands.name: clearwarnings
commands.description: Clear all of a member's warnings in this server.

commands.name: give
commands.description: Mint bits straight into a user's wallet (staff faucet). Admin only.

commands.name: immune
commands.description: Protect a member or role from moderation actions.

commands.name: immune add
commands.description: Add a member or role to the immune list.

commands.name: immune list
commands.description: Show the immune list.

commands.name: immune remove
commands.description: Remove a member or role from the immune list.

commands.name: jail
commands.description: Jail a member: strip their roles and apply the jail role.

commands.name: jail list
commands.description: List currently jailed members.

commands.name: jail role
commands.description: Set the role used for jailing. Configure its channel permissions yourself.

commands.name: kick
commands.description: Kick a member from the server.

commands.name: lock
commands.description: Stop @everyone from sending messages in this channel.

commands.name: lockdown
commands.description: Lock or unlock every channel at once.

commands.name: lockdown all
commands.description: Stop @everyone sending in every text channel.

commands.name: lockdown end
commands.description: Lift the lockdown across every text channel.

commands.name: massban
commands.description: Ban many users by ID at once (asks for confirmation).

commands.name: modlogs
commands.description: Full moderation history for a member (every case type).

commands.name: newusers
commands.description: List the newest members (raid / suspicious check). Max 100.

commands.name: nickname
commands.description: Set a member's nickname, or omit the name to reset it.

commands.name: note
commands.description: Staff notes on a member.

commands.name: note add
commands.description: Record a private note on a member.

commands.name: note list
commands.description: Show a member's notes.

commands.name: note remove
commands.description: Remove a case by id.

commands.name: pin
commands.description: Pin a message: reply to it, or give its ID or link.

commands.name: purge
commands.description: Delete the last n messages. Subcommands filter by type.

commands.name: purge after
commands.description: Messages after a target message.

commands.name: purge before
commands.description: Messages before a target message.

commands.name: purge between
commands.description: Messages between two target messages.

commands.name: purge bots
commands.description: Messages from bots.

commands.name: purge contains
commands.description: Messages containing a substring (min 3 chars).

commands.name: purge embeds
commands.description: Messages with embeds.

commands.name: purge endswith
commands.description: Messages ending with a substring (min 3 chars).

commands.name: purge files
commands.description: Messages with any attachment.

commands.name: purge humans
commands.description: Messages not from bots.

commands.name: purge images
commands.description: Messages with image attachments.

commands.name: purge invites
commands.description: Messages with server invites.

commands.name: purge links
commands.description: Messages containing links.

commands.name: purge mentions
commands.description: Messages with mentions.

commands.name: purge startswith
commands.description: Messages starting with a substring (min 3 chars).

commands.name: purge user
commands.description: Messages from one member.

commands.name: reason
commands.description: Edit the reason on an existing case by its id.

commands.name: role
commands.description: Role management. Bare command lists the subcommands.

commands.name: role bots
commands.description: Add a role to every bot.

commands.name: role color
commands.description: Change a role's color (hex).

commands.name: role create
commands.description: Create a role. Quote multi-word names.

commands.name: role delete
commands.description: Delete a role.

commands.name: role everyone
commands.description: Add a role to every member.

commands.name: role give
commands.description: Add a role to a member.

commands.name: role has
commands.description: Give everyone who has one role another role.

commands.name: role hoist
commands.description: Toggle whether a role shows in the sidebar.

commands.name: role humans
commands.description: Add a role to every non-bot member.

commands.name: role info
commands.description: Show details about a role. (No permission required.)

commands.name: role mentionable
commands.description: Toggle whether a role can be pinged.

commands.name: role rename
commands.description: Rename a role.

commands.name: role strip
commands.description: Remove a role from everyone who has it.

commands.name: role take
commands.description: Remove a role from a member.

commands.name: serverlog
commands.description: Configure audit logging for this server.

commands.name: serverlog channel
commands.description: Set the audit log channel (enables logging).

commands.name: serverlog disable
commands.description: Turn off all audit logging for this server.

commands.name: serverlog status
commands.description: Show this server's logging configuration.

commands.name: serverlog toggle
commands.description: Toggle an event: joins, leaves, deletes, edits, mod.

commands.name: slowmode
commands.description: Set this channel's slowmode delay in seconds (0 to disable, max 21600).

commands.name: softban
commands.description: Ban then immediately unban to clear a member's recent messages.

commands.name: staff
commands.description: Staff tools.

commands.name: staff blacklist
commands.description: Block a user from the entire bot. Admin only.

commands.name: staff demote
commands.description: Revoke a user's staff/admin tier (demoting an admin is owner only).

commands.name: staff econban
commands.description: Block a user from the economy only. Staff moderation tool.

commands.name: staff economy
commands.description: Server-wide economy totals: circulation, holdings, player count.

commands.name: staff error
commands.description: Diagnose a logged error by its code, e.g. ,staff error 7187AE.

commands.name: staff give
commands.description: Mint bits straight into a user's wallet (staff faucet). Admin only.

commands.name: staff history
commands.description: A user's economy transaction history.

commands.name: staff promote
commands.description: Grant a user staff, or `admin` (owner only), e.g. ,staff promote @u admin.

commands.name: staff reset
commands.description: Wipe a user's balance (wallet + vault) to zero. Staff moderation tool.

commands.name: staff roster
commands.description: Show the current admins and staff.

commands.name: staff take
commands.description: Remove bits from a user (staff sink; wallet first, then vault). Admin only.

commands.name: staff unblacklist
commands.description: Lift a user's bot-wide blacklist. Admin only.

commands.name: staff uneconban
commands.description: Lift a user's economy block. Staff moderation tool.

commands.name: take
commands.description: Remove bits from a user (staff sink; wallet first, then vault). Admin only.

commands.name: temprole
commands.description: Give a role that lifts itself after a duration (max 1 year).

commands.name: temprole list
commands.description: Show active temp roles.

commands.name: temprole remove
commands.description: Lift a temp role early.

commands.name: timeout
commands.description: Timeout a member for a duration like 10m, 2h, 1d.

commands.name: unban
commands.description: Unban a previously banned user by ID or mention.

commands.name: unjail
commands.description: Release a jailed member and restore their roles.

commands.name: unlock
commands.description: Restore @everyone's ability to send messages in this channel.

commands.name: unpin
commands.description: Unpin a message: reply to it, or give its ID or link.

commands.name: untimeout
commands.description: Remove a member's timeout.

commands.name: warn
commands.description: Warn a member. The warning is recorded for this server.

commands.name: warnings
commands.description: List a member's warnings in this server.

categories.name: Server Setup
categories.description: Configure the bot for your server.

commands.name: boosterrole
commands.description: Booster custom roles: boosters make and style one personal role.

commands.name: boosterrole anchor
commands.description: Set the role the booster-role cohort is positioned relative to.

commands.name: boosterrole create
commands.description: Create your booster role: name, hex color, optional emoji (quote spaced names).

commands.name: boosterrole disable
commands.description: Turn booster roles off.

commands.name: boosterrole edit
commands.description: Change your booster role's name, color, or emoji.

commands.name: boosterrole edit color
commands.description: Recolor your booster role (hex).

commands.name: boosterrole edit emoji
commands.description: Set your booster role's icon (needs the server's role-icon perk).

commands.name: boosterrole edit name
commands.description: Rename your booster role.

commands.name: boosterrole enable
commands.description: Turn booster roles on.

commands.name: boosterrole gradient
commands.description: Give your booster role a two-color gradient (needs Enhanced Role Colors).

commands.name: boosterrole hoist
commands.description: Whether custom roles sit above or below the anchor role.

commands.name: boosterrole hoist above
commands.description: Place booster roles above the anchor.

commands.name: boosterrole hoist below
commands.description: Place booster roles below the anchor.

commands.name: boosterrole holo
commands.description: Make your booster role holographic (needs Enhanced Role Colors).

commands.name: boosterrole reset
commands.description: Reset booster-role config to defaults (disabled, no anchor).

commands.name: boosterrole status
commands.description: Show config plus which boost-gated perks the guild currently has.

commands.name: buttonrole
commands.description: Roles granted by buttons on a bot message.

commands.name: buttonrole add
commands.description: Add a button to a bot message that toggles a role.

commands.name: buttonrole list
commands.description: List button roles in this server.

commands.name: buttonrole remove
commands.description: Remove one button by its index (see `,buttonrole list`).

commands.name: buttonrole removeall
commands.description: Remove all buttons from a message.

commands.name: buttonrole wipe
commands.description: Remove ALL button roles in this server (records only). Asks to confirm.

commands.name: createembed
commands.description: Open the interactive embed builder, or post one straight from JSON.

commands.name: embedcopy
commands.description: Copy a message's first embed as a JSON script (paste it into `,ce`).

commands.name: prefix
commands.description: Show this server's prefix, or set a new one (server owner only).

commands.name: reactionrole
commands.description: Roles granted by reacting to a message.

commands.name: reactionrole add
commands.description: Bind an emoji on a message to a role.

commands.name: reactionrole clear
commands.description: Remove all reaction roles in this server.

commands.name: reactionrole list
commands.description: List reaction roles in this server.

commands.name: reactionrole remove
commands.description: Unbind an emoji on a message.

commands.name: setup
commands.description: Open an interactive control panel to configure a module.

commands.name: stickymessage
commands.description: A message pinned to the bottom of a channel by reposting.

commands.name: stickymessage add
commands.description: Set the sticky message for a channel.

commands.name: stickymessage list
commands.description: List channels with sticky messages.

commands.name: stickymessage remove
commands.description: Remove a channel's sticky message.

commands.name: stickymessage view
commands.description: Show a channel's sticky message content.

commands.name: vanity
commands.description: Reward members who rep the server's vanity URL in their custom status.

commands.name: vanity channel
commands.description: Set the channel for thank-you messages.

commands.name: vanity disable
commands.description: Turn vanity rep off (existing roles stay until removed).

commands.name: vanity enable
commands.description: Turn vanity rep on (needs a Boost Level 3 / Partner vanity URL).

commands.name: vanity list
commands.description: List the members currently repping the vanity.

commands.name: vanity message
commands.description: Set the thank-you template. Placeholders: {user} {vanity}.

commands.name: vanity role
commands.description: Set the role granted to members repping the vanity.

commands.name: vanity status
commands.description: Show config plus the active rep count.

commands.name: vm
commands.description: Temporary voice channels members control with a button panel.

commands.name: vm disable
commands.description: Turn VoiceMaster off (existing channels stay until they empty).

commands.name: vm enable
commands.description: Turn VoiceMaster on.

commands.name: vm reset
commands.description: Delete all active VoiceMaster channels and reset the config.

commands.name: vm setup
commands.description: Pick the create channel and post the control panel (also enables VoiceMaster).

commands.name: webhook
commands.description: Manage webhooks the bot owns.

commands.name: webhook avatar
commands.description: Set a managed webhook's avatar from a URL or an attachment.

commands.name: webhook create
commands.description: Create a webhook in this channel.

commands.name: webhook delete
commands.description: Delete a managed webhook.

commands.name: webhook edit
commands.description: Edit a message a managed webhook sent in a channel.

commands.name: webhook list
commands.description: List managed webhooks.

commands.name: webhook send
commands.description: Send a message through a managed webhook.

commands.name: afk
commands.description: Mark yourself AFK. I'll tell anyone who pings you.

commands.name: ask
commands.description: Ask the AI a question.
commands.example: ask what's the capital of France?

commands.name: avatar
commands.description: Show a user's avatar full size.

commands.name: banner
commands.description: Show a user's profile banner.

commands.name: channelinfo
commands.description: Show details about a channel (defaults to this one).

commands.name: editsnipe
commands.description: Show the last edited message in this channel, before and after.

commands.name: emoji
commands.description: Custom emoji management. Bare command lists the subcommands.

commands.name: emoji add
commands.description: Add one or more emojis.

commands.name: emoji enlarge
commands.description: Show a custom emoji at full size. (No permission required.)

commands.name: emoji list
commands.description: List the server's custom emojis. (No permission required.)

commands.name: emoji remove
commands.description: Remove one or more server emojis.

commands.name: emoji rename
commands.description: Rename a server emoji.

commands.name: emojiinfo
commands.description: Show details about a custom emoji.

commands.name: inrole
commands.description: List the members who have a role.

commands.name: membercount
commands.description: Show how many members are in this server.

commands.name: remind
commands.description: Remind yourself after a duration, e.g. `,remind 2h check the oven`.

commands.name: reminder
commands.description: Your reminders.

commands.name: reminder list
commands.description: List your reminders.

commands.name: reminder remove
commands.description: Remove a reminder by its index.

commands.name: roles
commands.description: List every role in this server, highest first.

commands.name: serverinfo
commands.description: Show details about this server.

commands.name: snipe
commands.description: Show the last deleted message in this channel.

commands.name: sticker
commands.description: Custom sticker management. Bare command lists the subcommands.

commands.name: sticker add
commands.description: Add a sticker from a URL or an attachment (PNG/APNG, 320x320).

commands.name: sticker list
commands.description: List the server's custom stickers. (No permission required.)

commands.name: sticker remove
commands.description: Remove a server sticker.

commands.name: sticker rename
commands.description: Rename a server sticker.

commands.name: timer
commands.description: Send a message to a channel on an interval.

commands.name: timer add
commands.description: Add a timer (one timer per channel).

commands.name: timer list
commands.description: List timers in this server.

commands.name: timer remove
commands.description: Remove a channel's timer.

commands.name: timer view
commands.description: Show a channel's timer.

commands.name: userinfo
commands.description: Show details about a user.

commands.name: music
commands.description: Play music in voice channels. Try `,m play <song>`.

commands.name: music bass
commands.description: Boost the low end (0-100, 0 = flat).

commands.name: music channel
commands.description: Restrict music commands to one channel (no argument clears it).

commands.name: music clear
commands.description: Clear the queue without stopping the current track.

commands.name: music defaultvolume
commands.description: Set the volume new players start at (0-100).

commands.name: music disconnect
commands.description: Disconnect from voice.

commands.name: music dj
commands.description: Set (or clear, with no argument) the DJ role.

commands.name: music filters
commands.description: Reset all audio filters: `,m filters reset`.

commands.name: music history
commands.description: Show the tracks played this session.

commands.name: music loop
commands.description: Cycle loop mode: off -> track -> queue.

commands.name: music move
commands.description: Move a queued track from one position to another.

commands.name: music nightcore
commands.description: Toggle the nightcore (speed + pitch) filter.

commands.name: music nowplaying
commands.description: Post the persistent now-playing panel.

commands.name: music pause
commands.description: Pause playback.

commands.name: music play
commands.description: Play a track (search terms or a URL). Queues it if something's already playing.

commands.name: music queue
commands.description: Show the queue (paginated).

commands.name: music remove
commands.description: Remove a track from the queue by position.

commands.name: music replay
commands.description: Re-queue the most recently played track.

commands.name: music resume
commands.description: Resume playback.

commands.name: music search
commands.description: Show up to 5 results to pick from.

commands.name: music seek
commands.description: Seek the current track to a timestamp, e.g. `1:30`.

commands.name: music shuffle
commands.description: Shuffle the queue.

commands.name: music skip
commands.description: Skip the current track. DJs skip instantly; everyone else votes.

commands.name: music skipto
commands.description: Jump to a queue position (skips everything before it).

commands.name: music status
commands.description: Show this server's music configuration.

commands.name: music stop
commands.description: Clear the queue and disconnect.

commands.name: music volume
commands.description: Set playback volume (0-100).

commands.name: aura
commands.description: Read someone's aura points, which can go negative. Resets daily.

commands.name: based
commands.description: Get your own based rating for the day.

commands.name: bite
commands.description: Bite someone.

commands.name: bonk
commands.description: Bonk someone.

commands.name: caught
commands.description: Catch someone in 4K, with the evidence. Stays random.

commands.name: cuddle
commands.description: Cuddle someone.

commands.name: delulu
commands.description: Measure someone's delulu percentage. Resets daily.

commands.name: glazing
commands.description: Measure how hard someone is glazing, and over what. Resets daily.

commands.name: hug
commands.description: Hug someone.

commands.name: ick
commands.description: Reveal someone's ick of the day.

commands.name: kiss
commands.description: Kiss someone.

commands.name: npc
commands.description: Declare someone a certified NPC, with their trait of the day.

commands.name: pat
commands.description: Pat someone.

commands.name: pinch
commands.description: Pinch someone.

commands.name: poke
commands.description: Poke someone.

commands.name: punch
commands.description: Punch someone.

commands.name: ratio
commands.description: Hit someone with a fake ratio. Stays random.

commands.name: rizz
commands.description: Rate someone's rizz out of 100. Resets daily.

commands.name: sigma
commands.description: Measure someone's sigma grindset, with a quote. Resets daily.

commands.name: skill
commands.description: Diagnose a skill issue, with severity. Resets daily.

commands.name: slap
commands.description: Slap someone.

commands.name: sus
commands.description: Accuse someone of being the impostor. Stays random.

categories.name: Bot
categories.description: About the bot and owner tools.

commands.name: botinfo
commands.description: Show bot stats: commands, servers, and users.

commands.name: help
commands.description: Show the command menu, or detailed help for one command.

commands.name: invite
commands.description: Get a link to add me to another server.

commands.name: leaveserver
commands.description: Make the bot leave a server by id (asks for confirmation).

commands.name: ping
commands.description: Show gateway latency and round-trip time.

commands.name: servers
commands.description: List servers the bot is in.

commands.name: status
commands.description: Show bot stats: servers, users, latency, loaded cogs.
